title: cerastium nigrescens var. acutifolium
intro: Cerastium nigrescens var. acutifolium, also known as the Black-stemmed Mouse-ear Chickweed, is a plant species within the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin irritations and wounds due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cerastium nigrescens var. acutifolium include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves for topical application, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various skin conditions, including eczema and acne.
